subcodes.first_line: I know not, O my God, what the Fire is which Thou didst kindle in Thy land. Earth can never cloud its splendor
subcodes.first_line_orig: لم ادر یا الهی ای نار جعلتها مشتعله فی ارضک بحیث لایسترها التراب و لایخمدها
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @fire and light; fire and water, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
